title: Finalise Bangladesh’s textile-RMG circular economy strategy: Experts
content:
Bangladesh government officials, industry leaders and sustainability experts recently called for finalising a national circular economy strategy for the textile and RMG sector as that is essential to protect competitiveness in the global apparel market. 
They emphasised the need to embed circular practices across the entire value chain while improving transparency and building institutional capacity.

title: Conference reaffirms Bac Ninh province’s role as FDI leader in Vietnam
content:
A recent forum organised by the Vietnam Chamber of Commerce and Industry and the Bac Ninh provincial People’s Committee aimed at supporting efforts to achieve the 2026 GDP growth target of at least 10 per cent, transform the country into a regional high-tech hub and reaffirm Bac Ninh’s role as a leader in attracting FDI. 
The province is prioritising the development of strategic infrastructure.

title: BKMEA concerned over load shedding, rising energy costs in Bangladesh
content:
Expressing concern over the ongoing load shedding and fuel crisis, the Bangladesh Knitwear Manufacturers and Exporters Association has said production is being severely disrupted due to power shortage, hitting exports. 
The crisis is especially acute in some rural areas like Bhaluka, Sripur and Rajendrapur, and many factories are running at 50-60-per cent capacity.
